## Summary

What this PR changes, in 1-3 sentences. Lead with the why, not the what.

## Scope

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / new flag
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / build / CI only

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` clean
- [ ] `npm test` passes (153/153 baseline)
- [ ] `npm run test:integration` passes (or skipped — no backend reachable)
- [ ] Manual smoke: include the `arnie --print "..."` invocation you ran

## Notes for reviewer

Anything subtle, non-obvious, or worth a second pair of eyes.
